Ep-r• 74• 4• 564841 ft-4W 7-7-1994 $ V f wr• yr. f4• 4• 75608 r4•4.0 18-10-94 MINISTRY OF PERSONNEL, PUBLIC GRIEVANCES AND PENSIONS (Department of Personnel and Training) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 22nd January, 1996 G.S.R. 41(E).--In exercise of the powers conferred by Sub-section (1) read with clauses (d), (e) and (f) of Sub-section (2) of Section 35 and clause (c) of Section 36 of the Administrative Tribunals Act, 1985 (13 of 1985), the Central Government hereby makes the following rules further to amend the Central Administrative Tribunal (Procedure) Rules, 1987, namely :-- 1. (1) These rules may be called the Central Administrative Tribunal (Procedure) Amendment Rules, 1996. (2) They shall come intc force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In Rule 3 of the Central Administrative Tribunal (Procedure) Rules, 1987, in Sub-rule (1), in the second proviso, in clause (3), the words, figures, letters and brackets "located in 'Region (A)' as defined in clause (f) of rule 2 of the Official Languages (Use for Official Purposes of the Union) Rules, 1976" shall be omitted. [No. I-42012/3/92-AT Vol-IV] SMT. SARITA PRASAD, Jt. Secy. Foot Note :--The Principal Rules were published in the Gazette of India vide notification number GSR 17(E) dated 6-1-1987 and (i) No. subsequently amended vide :-- GSR 1000(E), dated 11-10-1988. (ii) No. GSR 99(E), dated 26-2-1991. (iii) No. GSR 557(E), dated 4-9-1991. (iv) No. GSR 564(E), dated 7-7-1994. (v) No. GSR 756(E), dated 18-10-1994. Printed by the Manager, Govt. of India Press.
